categoryDesc.corporate: Corporate elegance. Long-lasting designs for offices and events.
categoryDesc.plant: Potted plants and terrariums — living, breathing, growing gifts.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: A story devoted to the art of flowers.

voices.title: In the Language of Flowers
voices.subtitle: Vahap Akar, a florist of forty years — in his own words. Tap the video to turn on sound.

story.title:
At the heart
of Fethiye,
from the soul
of Holland.
story.p1: Flora Art is a young and passionate florist founded in the heart of Fethiye, on Atatürk Avenue. Born from the power of women's entrepreneurship, the brand sees floristry not as a craft but as an art.
story.p2: Flowers sourced directly from Amsterdam's famous auctions meet the Mediterranean warmth of Fethiye. Every bouquet, every arrangement — tells a feeling, a moment, a story.
story.quote: To give a flower is to say everything words cannot.

items.title: Speed
items.description: On time, every time, as promised.

items.title: Uniqueness
items.description: Every arrangement unique, every customer special.

founder.name: Vahap Bey
founder.p1: Her passion for flowers turned her into Fethiye's most refined florist. Blending Dutch training with Mediterranean aesthetics, she created Flora Art with a singular point of view.
founder.p2: Every morning starts in the atelier with her team; she checks each bouquet by hand. She redefines, every day, how a Fethiye brand can open to the world.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: We get back to you as soon as possible.

delivery.title: Delivery
delivery.subtitle: From Holland to your door, guaranteed.

steps.title: Place the Order
steps.description: Online or via WhatsApp — share the flower, the date, and the delivery address with us.

steps.title: Sourced from Holland
steps.description: Every morning Holland Premium flowers are hand-picked at Amsterdam's Aalsmeer auction and shipped to our atelier.

steps.title: Carefully Packaged
steps.description: Branded packaging with moisture protection. Each bouquet is arranged by hand, with care.

steps.title: At Your Door
steps.description: Delivered on an unbroken cold chain. Satisfaction guaranteed — until a smile is born.

zones.title: Delivery Regions
zones.subtitle: Three regions, three timeframes — the same quality everywhere.

items.a: Yes. We deliver within 2 hours around Fethiye and same-day across Turkey. Orders placed before 14:00 arrive on the same day.
We deliver to Europe, Russia, the Middle East, and worldwide within 1 business day. Pricing depends on the country — request a quote via WhatsApp.
All flowers are Holland Premium quality, sourced directly from Amsterdam's auction. Hand-arranged in our atelier on an unbroken cold chain.

items.q: Can I choose the delivery time?
items.a: Yes. You can choose between Morning (08:00–12:00), Midday (12:00–16:00), or Evening (16:00–20:00). For a specific hour, just write to us.
For quality issues reported within 4 hours after delivery, we send a free replacement. All products carry an on-site satisfaction guarantee.

bottomCta.title: Ready to place an order?
bottomCta.subtitle: Pick from the online collection or reach us on WhatsApp.

testimonials.subtitle: The Best Florist in Fethiye on Google

items.quote: A family-run business that knows hospitality and quality service. Every detail is thoughtful.
items.author: Hkn Koçalan

items.quote: Every flower is more beautiful than the last — I won't buy from anywhere else now. Highly recommend.
items.author: Berivan

story.title:
From Amsterdam
to your door.
story.p1: Every morning the freshest, rarest flowers are hand-picked at Amsterdam's Aalsmeer auction — Holland Premium quality, delivered to Fethiye with an unbroken cold chain.
story.p2: Each bouquet is arranged by hand in our atelier. In-season, fresh, and exactly right. Anywhere in Turkey within 2 hours; worldwide within 1 day.
